content: RFC 8628 OAuth Device Authorization Grant: Server issues device_code (high entropy, not shown to user) and user_code (8-char, shown to user) with expires_in and optional interval (default 5s). Token polling uses grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:device_code. Error codes: authorization_pending (keep polling), slow_down (increase interval by 5s), expired_token (stop), access_denied (user denied, stop). Security: user code needs rate limiting - with 8-char base-20 code (34.5 bits entropy), only 5 attempts in the validity period needed to make brute force infeasible. Case-insensitive comparison; ignore punctuation.
